positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a cosmic forest at twilight. Silhouettes of exotic, towering flora (ferns, glowing mushrooms, and fractal-leaf trees) stand against a deep gradient sky transitioning from indigo to soft lavender. The atmosphere is magical and serene, with subtle neon-blue and gold bioluminescence emanating from the ground and foliage. The composition is perfectly centered and balanced, featuring strong negative space and high contrast, suitable for large-scale apparel printing. Ink wash aesthetic meets modern scientific illustration, vector art style, highly detailed, symmetry, clean lines, centered composition, perfect silhouette.
negative: blurry, noisy, messy, watermark, text, low resolution, grain, poor anatomy, extra limbs, asymmetrical, gradient variation, deep shadows, copyright, logo, typography
